name: Picnic Potatoe Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in their jackets until tender.
2. Allow the potatoes to cool completely, then peel and chop into large chunks.
3. In a large bowl, mix together mayonnaise, yellow mustard, Louisiana hot sauce, and salt.
4. Add the chopped potatoes and remaining ingredients (celery, sweet relish, dill relish, parsley, salad olives, onions) to the bowl.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
6. If desired, add a little more dressing before serving to ensure a moist consistency.
7. This recipe can be prepared ahead of time and refrigerated overnight for convenience at your picnic.
"Serves 8 Cajuns or 24 other peoples for a good picnic."
From Justin Wilson's "Outdoor Cooking With Inside Help"
